title: Tags and search updates and addtional veiw on mobile
excerpt:

posts.author: mathump3 (Mathew Humphrey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Please can we add some way of “tagging” updates in the item updates section, or some sort of colour codeing or some way of defining what the update is about, a little like the Email and activity widdget.

Please can we also have a search function with in the updates coupled with tags willl make it easier to find what we are looking for.

All of thjis needs to be accessable on the App.

Our contract mangers enter site notes directly into Monday. we would use the Mail and activit wigit but you cant veiw it on the mobile app so we are stuck with just the updates section which is great but there is not sorting funtion or tagging wich would be som much nicer to use and to stay orginised.
